footer.tagline: Free sports prediction platform to play with friends.
footer.disclaimer: Football pools, picks, and brackets — 100% free, no real money or gambling.

beta.message: Beta — Your feedback helps us improve

hero.title: Compete with friends predicting football matches
hero.subtitle: Create your free sports pool and have fun predicting football results with your friends.

whatIs.title: What is Picks4All?
whatIs.p1: Picks4All is the free platform to create sports pools online and compete with friends, family, or coworkers by predicting football results. Known as polla futbolera in Colombia, prode in Argentina, penca in Uruguay, or porra in Spain.
whatIs.p2: Create your pool for free, invite anyone with a code, make your predictions and compete on the leaderboard. 100% free with no gambling — just fun and friendly rivalry.

features.title: Everything you need to compete
features.subtitle: A complete platform to organize sports pools with friends, family, or coworkers.

feature1.title: Create your pool
feature1.description: Customize rules, scoring system, and deadlines. You decide how your pool is played.

feature2.title: Live leaderboard
feature2.description: Rankings automatically updated after every match. Always know who's winning.

feature3.title: Flexible predictions
feature3.description: Exact score, match result, goal difference. Multiple ways to earn points with your picks.

feature4.title: Invite friends easily
feature4.description: Share an invitation code via WhatsApp and done. Join in seconds, no hassle.

step1.title: Create or join
step1.description: Create your own pool or join an existing one with an invitation code.

step2.title: Make your predictions
step2.description: Enter your picks before each match deadline.

step3.title: Climb the rankings
step3.description: Earn points with every correct prediction and prove you're the best predictor.

tournaments.title: Available tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: Create pools for the most exciting tournaments in the world.

wc2026.name: World Cup 2026
wc2026.description: 48 teams • 104 matches • The biggest tournament in history

copaAmerica2028.name: Copa América 2028
copaAmerica2028.description: 16 teams • The oldest tournament in the world

libertadores.name: Copa Libertadores
libertadores.description: The best clubs in South America

premierLeague.name: Premier League
premierLeague.description: The most competitive league in the world

final.title: Ready to prove you know football?
final.subtitle: Join for free and start competing with your friends.
final.hint: Create your free pool in less than 1 minute.

home.title: Free Sports Predictions with Friends - Picks4All
home.description: Create free football pools and predictions. Predict World Cup 2026, Champions League results and more. No real money, just fun with friends.
home.ogDescription: The free platform to create football pools and predictions. Compete with friends by predicting match results.

jsonLd.orgDescription: Free sports prediction platform (pools, picks, brackets) to compete with friends predicting football results
jsonLd.appDescription: Free sports prediction platform (pools, picks, brackets) to compete with friends predicting football results
featureList: Compatible with World Cup 2026 and Champions League

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.subtitle: See what's new in Picks4All
whatsNew.item1Desc: The Champions League Round of 16 matchups are now available. All pools have been automatically updated with the real fixtures.
whatsNew.item2Desc: You can now choose per phase whether the score counts at 90 minutes or includes extra time. Set it up when creating your pool.
whatsNew.item3Desc: You can now see more clearly the deadline to submit your predictions and the kickoff time for each match.

meta.title: Corporate Sports Pools for Companies — Picks4All
meta.description: Organize corporate sports pools in your company. Create pools between departments, invite employees and foster team building with sports predictions.

hero.title: Corporate sports pools for your company
hero.subtitle: Foster team building and friendly competition among your teams with sports pools. Set up in minutes, no hassle.

benefits.title: Why choose Picks4All for your company
benefits.teamBuildingDesc: Strengthen relationships between teams with a fun and accessible competition for everyone.
benefits.easySetupDesc: Create your pool in minutes. Upload a CSV with your employees' emails and we take care of the rest.
benefits.engagementDesc: Keep your team motivated and connected during the most important tournaments in the world.
benefits.supportDesc: Priority support for companies. We help you set up and manage your pools.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose the tournament, customize the rules and upload your company logo.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload a CSV or add emails manually. Each employee will receive an activation link.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your employees activate their account with one click and start making predictions right away.

pricing.title: Free during beta
pricing.subtitle: Enjoy full access at no cost while we're in beta. No employee limit.

cta.title: Get started
cta.subtitle: Create your corporate pool in less than 5 minutes.

create.title: Create corporate pool
create.subtitle: Follow these steps to set up your company pool.
create.step2Desc: Select the tournament for your pool.
create.step5Desc: Choose the player capacity for your pool.
create.step6Desc: Invite your team. You can also do this later.
create.step7Desc: Review everything before creating your pool.
create.aprilNotice: The platform will be 100% ready on April 1st. You can create your pool now and we'll notify you on April 1st to complete the payment.
create.logoHint: PNG or JPG image, max 500 KB
create.welcomeMessageHint: Shown when entering the corporate pool
create.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Message your employees will see when they enter the pool...
create.invitationMessageHint: Included in the invitation email sent to your employees
create.invitationMessagePlaceholder: Personalized message your employees will receive in the email...
create.requireApprovalDesc: Employees joining with a code will need your approval.
create.scoringNeeded: Click the button to configure scoring.
create.employeesDesc: You can add employees now or do it later from the pool admin panel.
create.emailsPlaceholder: Paste email addresses, one per line...
create.error: Error creating pool. Please try again.

activation.title: Activate your account
activation.subtitle: Create your username and password to start playing.
activation.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Service
activation.acceptAge: I confirm I am at least 13 years old

activation.invalidTokenHelp: Contact your company administrator to receive a new invitation.
activation.alreadyActivated: This invitation has already been activated.
